enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting the emotional turmoil of the protagonist.

How does this song fit into the plot of 7G Rainbow Colony?

It captures the essence of the lead character's romantic struggles and emotional journey throughout the film.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by KK and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was this song released?

The song was released on October 15, 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ninaithu Ninaithu Male, the protagonist reflects on his unfulfilled love, evoking a sense of nostalgia and melancholy. The song beautifully captures the essence of longing, as the lyrics convey deep emotions tied to memories of a cherished relationship. Set against the backdrop of 7G Rainbow Colony, it enhances the narrative of love and heartache. KK's soulful rendition, combined with Yuvan's evocative music, makes this track a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ninaithu Ninaithu Male from 7G Rainbow Colony is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of longing and love. With KK's soulful voice and Yuvan's masterful composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet pangs of romance. Dive into the emotional depths of this classic track that remains a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Thinking about you, I have come down and am living for you. Today, I am looking at you.
Before I finish reading, the burning message is for whom? I am living for you. Today, I am looking at you.
In the shadow of the trees that speak softly, how can I express what I feel? The silence of the flowers has gone.
How can I express the sound of the flute that speaks? The ring that has gone, does it still speak?
In the heat of the heart, where are the fingers today? There is no face to tell stories here.
Before the end of the beginning, do not let sleep take over.
All the words spoken will be heard in the time of hardship, will the words of sorrow and joy be heard?
Will all the sights seen fade away, and will the life that hears the questions also fade away?
The shadow that has come will merge into the fire, I have not believed in the stolen moments.
I am living thinking that you are a challenge in youth.
